raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is one of only three states to pass legislation to ban deceptive campaign donation tactics.",
    "Hundreds of thousands of people were tricked into contributing over $122 million to Donald Trump's campaign in 2020.",
    "Pre-checked donation boxes that enroll donors in recurring payments without their knowledge have become increasingly popular.",
    "The Trump campaign had to refund nearly 11% of the funds raised through its online platform, totaling more than $122 million.",
    "AB 775 states that passive action by the contributor does not meet the requirement of affirmative consent for recurring contributions."
  ]
}
```
